Accommodations

Browse accommodations by attraction, country, and route logic.

Every stay is attached to a nearby attraction so travelers can understand why it is worth considering before leaving Trek Africa Guide.

Image slot Stay Sanctuary Gorilla Forest Camp

Uganda • Forest safari camp

Sanctuary Gorilla Forest Camp

A long-established forest camp positioned inside the Bwindi area for early gorilla-trekking starts and a quieter rainforest stay.

★ 4.8 (318) From $800 / night
Bwindi Impenetrable National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Paraa Safari Lodge

Uganda • Safari lodge

Paraa Safari Lodge

A practical Nile-side lodge for travelers combining boat safaris, falls visits, and northern-bank game drives.

★ 4.5 (521) From $220 / night
Murchison Falls National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Governors Camp

Kenya • Safari tented camp

Governors' Camp

A historic tented camp in a strong game-viewing zone, often used by travelers who want classic Mara atmosphere without losing comfort.

★ 4.7 (684) From $620 / person
Maasai Mara
View Details
Image slot Stay Ol Tukai Lodge Amboseli

Kenya • Safari lodge

Ol Tukai Lodge Amboseli

A well-known Amboseli base for elephant viewing and Kilimanjaro-facing safari days.

★ 4.6 (477) From $300 / night
Amboseli National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Serengeti Serena Safari Lodge

Tanzania • Safari lodge

Serengeti Serena Safari Lodge

A central Serengeti lodge that fits classic northern-circuit itineraries and travelers who want reliable lodge infrastructure.

★ 4.6 (593) From $360 / night
Serengeti National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Emerson Spice

Tanzania • Boutique heritage hotel

Emerson Spice

A characterful Stone Town hotel for travelers who want Zanzibar heritage and food culture before or after beach time.

★ 4.5 (356) From $180 / night
Zanzibar
View Details
Image slot Stay Mount Nelson A Belmond Hotel

South Africa • Luxury city hotel

Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel

A landmark Cape Town hotel that works well for city, coast, food, and Winelands planning.

★ 4.8 (882) From $650 / night
Cape Town
View Details
Image slot Stay Kruger Shalati

South Africa • Luxury safari hotel

Kruger Shalati - The Train on the Bridge

A distinctive Kruger stay built around restored train carriages on the Selati Bridge over the Sabie River.

★ 4.7 (519) From $800 / night
Kruger National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Victoria Falls Hotel

Zimbabwe • Heritage hotel

The Victoria Falls Hotel

A historic hotel within easy reach of the falls rainforest entrance and town activities.

★ 4.7 (731) From $420 / night
Victoria Falls
View Details
Image slot Stay Riad Rosemary

Morocco • Boutique riad

Riad Rosemary

A design-led riad choice for travelers who want the medina experience without giving up comfort and calm.

★ 4.6 (219) From $240 / night
Marrakech & Atlas Gateway
View Details
Image slot Stay Sabyinyo Silverback Lodge

Rwanda • Luxury gorilla lodge

Sabyinyo Silverback Lodge

A conservation-linked luxury lodge close to Rwanda gorilla trekking departure points.

★ 4.8 (241) From $1,000 / night
Volcanoes National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Maribela Hotel

Ethiopia • Boutique hotel

Maribela Hotel

A hillside hotel option for visitors who want views and straightforward access to Lalibela church touring.

★ 4.4 (187) From $95 / night
Lalibela
View Details
Image slot Stay Ridge Royal Hotel

Ghana • City hotel

Ridge Royal Hotel

A practical Cape Coast base for combining castle visits with a Kakum canopy walkway day.

★ 4.3 (214) From $140 / night
Cape Coast & Kakum
View Details
Image slot Stay Les Paletuviers

Senegal • Delta lodge

Les Paletuviers

A delta lodge base for boat trips, birdlife, mangroves, and slower Senegal travel.

★ 4.4 (168) From $160 / night
Sine-Saloum Delta
View Details
Image slot Stay Casa Del Papa

Benin • Coastal resort

Casa del Papa Resort & Spa

A lagoon-and-coast resort that works as a comfortable base for Ouidah heritage touring.

★ 4.3 (191) From $170 / night
Ouidah & Ganvié
View Details
Image slot Stay The Place Resort Tokeh

Sierra Leone • Beach resort

The Place Resort at Tokeh Beach

A beachfront resort option for travelers focusing on Sierra Leone coastline time.

★ 4.4 (203) From $190 / night
Tokeh & River No. 2 Beach
View Details
Image slot Stay Hilton Cabo Verde Sal Resort

Cabo Verde • Beach resort

Hilton Cabo Verde Sal Resort

A polished Santa Maria resort for travelers who want reliable beach logistics and a comfortable Atlantic island base.

★ 4.5 (624) From $230 / night
Sal Island
View Details
Image slot Stay Camp Okavango

Botswana • Delta safari camp

Camp Okavango

A water-and-wilderness camp for travelers prioritizing mokoro channels, guided walks, and low-density Delta safari.

★ 4.8 (164) From $900 / night
Okavango Delta
View Details
Image slot Stay Sossusvlei Lodge

Namibia • Desert lodge

Sossusvlei Lodge

A practical desert lodge near the Sesriem entrance for early access to Sossusvlei and Deadvlei.

★ 4.5 (438) From $260 / night
Namib Desert
View Details
Image slot Stay Mfuwe Lodge

Zambia • Safari lodge

Mfuwe Lodge

A well-known South Luangwa lodge for game drives and walking safari access near Mfuwe.

★ 4.7 (255) From $580 / night
South Luangwa National Park
View Details
Image slot Stay Desert Luxury Camp

Morocco • Desert camp

Desert Luxury Camp

A desert camp option for travelers who want the Sahara overnight without presenting it as a quick city excursion.

★ 4.5 (286) From $220 / night
Sahara Dunes
View Details
Image slot Stay Marriott Mena House Cairo

Egypt • Heritage luxury hotel

Marriott Mena House, Cairo

A Giza-side hotel known for pyramid views and easy access to the plateau.

★ 4.7 (1,284) From $360 / night
Cairo & Giza
View Details
Image slot Stay Dar Said

Tunisia • Boutique hotel

Dar Said

A boutique base in Sidi Bou Said for travelers pairing Tunis medina, Carthage, and sea-view village time.

★ 4.4 (251) From $190 / night
Tunis & Sidi Bou Said
View Details
Image slot Stay Terres Touareg Guest House

Algeria • Guest house and desert camp

Terres Touareg Guest House & Desert Camp

A specialist Djanet base combining traditional guest-house nights with guided desert camping routes.

★ 4.6 (76) Tour quoted on request
Djanet & Tassili n’Ajjer
View Details

Trek Africa Guide

African travel guide and booking directory for regions, countries, attractions, stays, dining, and trusted partner booking paths.

Travelers can compare the route logic, nearby stays, dining, and practical access notes on Trek Africa Guide before continuing to external booking partners.
